results.title: AutoGen
results.description: AutoGen is a framework developed by Microsoft for building, optimizing, and evaluating LLM applications, allowing multiple agents to converse with each other to solve tasks.

results.title: Autogen
results.description: AutoGen is a framework for creating multi-agent AI applications that can act autonomously or work alongside humans.

results.title: FFmpeg.AutoGen
results.description: FFmpeg auto generated unsafe bindings for C#/.NET and Core (Linux, MacOS and Mono).

results.title: AutoGen
results.description: AutoGen is a framework for building AI multi-agent systems.

results.title: Windows Bindgen
results.description: A Rust crate that automatically generates Rust bindings from Windows metadata, simplifying Windows API integration in Rust projects.

results.title: MatterGen
results.description: MatterGen is a generative model for inorganic materials design across the periodic table that can be fine-tuned to steer the generation towards a wide range of property constraints.

results.title: Sqlgen
results.description: Sqlgen is a modern, type-safe ORM and SQL query generator for C++20, providing a fluent, composable interface for database operations with compile-time type checking and SQL injection protection.

results.title: Datagen
results.description: DATAGEN is an AI-powered platform using a multi-agent system for automated data analysis, visualization, and report generation, leveraging LangChain and OpenAI.

results.title: AutoGluon
results.description: AutoGluon automates machine learning tasks, enabling users to easily train and deploy high-accuracy models on image, text, time series, and tabular data with minimal code.

results.title: Officegen
results.description: Standalone Office Open XML files (Microsoft Office 2007 and later) generator for Word (docx), PowerPoint (pptx) and Excell (xlsx) in javascript. The output is a stream.

results.title: Mutagen
results.description: Mutagen is a tool for efficient file synchronization and network forwarding, designed to improve development workflows across local, remote, and containerized environments like Docker.

results.title: Matugen
results.description: Matugen is a cross-platform tool for generating Material You color palettes from images or colors, with features for customization, keyword filtering, and application integration.

results.title: Mutagen
results.description: Mutagen is a remote development tool that provides high-performance real-time file synchronization and flexible network forwarding for working with code in remote environments like cloud servers and containers.

results.title: AutoRegisterInject
results.description: C# Source Generator to automatically register dependencies in Microsoft Dependency Injection Service Collection

results.title: Litgen
results.description: litgen is an automatic Python bindings generator for C++ libraries using pybind11 or nanobind, creating discoverable, well-documented, and IDE-friendly bindings.

results.title: SwiftGen
results.description: SwiftGen is a tool that automatically generates Swift code for project resources like images and localized strings, ensuring type-safe usage and preventing runtime errors.

results.title: Codegen
results.description: Codegen is a platform that enables running and managing AI code agents at scale, acting as an AI coworker to automate software engineering tasks like coding, bug fixing, testing, and PR reviews.

results.title: AutoRAG
results.description: AutoRAG is an AutoML tool that automatically finds, evaluates, and optimizes the best Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline for specific data and use cases, supporting data creation, optimization, and deployment.

results.title: wgsl-bindgen
results.description: Generate typesafe Rust bindings from WGSL shaders for wgpu, automating the creation of Rust types, constants, and boilerplate code to match shaders, ensuring compile-time error detection.

results.title: Ergogen
results.description: Ergogen is an ergonomic keyboard generator that provides a common configuration format to describe 2D layouts and generate automatic plates, cases, and un-routed PCBs.

results.title: autobrr
results.description: autobrr is a versatile download automation tool for torrents and Usenet that monitors real-time IRC announcements and RSS feeds to filter and send content to various download clients.

results.title: OmniGen
results.description: OmniGen is a unified image generation model capable of producing diverse images from multi-modal prompts without requiring additional plugins or preprocessing steps.

results.title: Autocert
results.description: Autocert is a Kubernetes add-on that automatically injects TLS/HTTPS certificates into containers for secure communication, simplifying mTLS adoption within clusters.

results.title: AutoVerus
results.description: AutoVerus is an approach and toolset for automated synthesis of Verus proofs, enabling automated proof generation for Rust programs.

results.title: Micronaut Projectgen
results.description: Micronaut projectgen is a tool for generating Micronaut projects, simplifying the setup and configuration process for new applications.

results.title: Sqlacodegen
results.description: Automatic model code generator for SQLAlchemy

results.title: Rcgen
results.description: Generate X.509 certificates, CSRs

results.title: AutoRAG (llmstxt)
results.description: AutoRAG is a Cloudflare service that allows developers to create fully managed retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines for powering AI applications with accurate and up-to-date information without managing infrastructure.

results.title: Kraken
results.description: OCR engine for all the languages
